title: How a man of God handles disappointment
caption:
God didn't promise you the life you planned. He promised something better.

But that's hard to hear when the thing you wanted didn't come through — the job, the relationship, the plan that made sense. Disappointment hits different when you were praying for it.

Here's what most men do wrong: they process it horizontally first. They talk to everyone before they talk to God. They get sympathy without perspective, and they build bitterness instead of faith.

David didn't sanitize his prayers. He brought the whole thing — raw, confused, even angry. That's not a lack of faith. Pretending you're fine is closer to one.

"The heart of a man plans his way, but the Lord establishes his steps." — Proverbs 16:9.

Plan hard. Hold it loose. The man who lets God rewrite his plans usually finds they were too small anyway.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #trust #humility #christianity #scripture #disciplineequalsfreedom
